testsuite.name: s2s.email

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Routing applied → PSP: paynetics, RouteTo: panatics-mid Input Amounts - Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Default: 500.0 Input amount is greater than maximum boundary. Default amount is outside valid range. Using system fallback value. Generated First Name: johnb7f Purchase created: 6980a499c99d05c8cc5078eb Clicked on ZaakPay submit button on bank page Opened staging environment in a new browser tab User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Entered Transaction ID: 6980a499c99d05c8cc5078eb Clicked on Search button Clicked on Search button Clicked on first Transaction ID from list Purchase Transaction ID is not empty or not null

testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page Routing applied → PSP: easybuzz, RouteTo: easebuzz_card Input Amounts - Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Default: 100.0 Input amount is equal to maximum boundary. Boundary value provided by tester. Using default amount directly. testcase.name: purchaseApi
testcase.system-out: User enter ID in Username field User Enter Password in password field Click on submit button in login page select merchant name :- SuhasM select merchant name :- INR select merchant name :- MASTER Fetching details for Limit and Charges Details fetched successfully Routing applied → PSP: easybuzz, RouteTo: easebuzz_card Input Amounts - Min: 10.0, Max: 100.0, Default: 100.0 Input amount is equal to maximum boundary. Boundary value provided by tester. Using default amount directly.
